metadata.name: rkpc_conventional_radar_sid_geometry_audit
metadata.purpose: Pre-automation geometry derivation ledger for RKPC conventional and RADAR SID procedures that are cataloged but not yet safe for runtime route guidance.
rules: Every conventional/radar SID in the SID/STAR route register must have one item here.
Every item remains runtime_route_allowed=false until radial, DME, arc, or vector geometry is derived from source charts and independently verified.
This file describes required derivation work only; it does not authorize procedure autopilot routing.

procedures.route_text: Climb on R 067 YDM until D6.5, then turn left to intercept R 013 CJU, then proceed direct to IPDAS.
procedures.source_section: IPDAS FOUR KILO DEPARTURE chart text
procedures.blocking_reason: YDM R067 D6.5, CJU R013/D30.0, D30.0-to-IPDAS continuation, turn-capture tolerance, and a training runtime path are validated, but exact full chart linework still must be checked before it can become an exact route queue.

procedures.route_text: Climb on R 067 YDM, then proceed direct to MAKET.
procedures.source_section: MAKET FOUR KILO DEPARTURE chart text
procedures.blocking_reason: Requires YDM radial track and release/direct-to-MAKET geometry before it can become a route queue.

procedures.route_text: Climb on R 067 YDM until D13.5, then right heading 169 to intercept R 101 YDM, then direct TAMNA.
procedures.source_section: TAMNA TWO KILO DEPARTURE chart text
procedures.blocking_reason: Requires generated YDM D13.5 point, heading leg, and R101 intercept geometry before it can become a route queue.

procedures.route_text: Climb on R 067 YDM until D13.5, then right heading 169 to intercept R 073 CJU, then direct CJU.
procedures.source_section: JEJU FIVE KILO DEPARTURE chart text
procedures.blocking_reason: Requires generated YDM D13.5 point, heading leg, and CJU radial intercept geometry before it can become a route queue.

procedures.route_text: Climb on R 245 YDM until D9.0, then right via YDM D9.0 arc to R 326 YDM, then via R 326 YDM to YDM, then direct CJU via R 146 YDM.
procedures.source_section: JEJU THREE LIMA DEPARTURE chart text
procedures.blocking_reason: Requires radial track, YDM D9.0 arc, arc exit, and downstream radial/direct segment geometry before it can become a route queue.

procedures.route_text: Climb on R 245 YDM until D9.0, then right via YDM D9.0 arc to R 008 YDM, then left on R 008 YDM until D18.6 to join R 353 CJU and proceed via CJU D27.0 arc to R 013 CJU, then via R 013 CJU to IPDAS.
procedures.source_section: IPDAS ONE LIMA DEPARTURE chart text
procedures.blocking_reason: Requires multiple YDM/CJU radial tracks, DME arc endpoints, and arc join/exit geometry before it can become a route queue.

procedures.route_text: Take off RWY 07: climb on runway heading until reaching 2 200 ft for radar vector.
procedures.source_section: RADAR TWO ECHO DEPARTURE chart text
procedures.blocking_reason: Requires runway-heading vector behavior and radar release altitude handling before it can become a runtime SID mode.

procedures.route_text: Take off RWY 25: climb on runway heading until reaching 3 000 ft for radar vector.
procedures.source_section: RADAR THREE WHISKEY DEPARTURE chart text
procedures.blocking_reason: Requires runway-heading vector behavior and radar release altitude handling before it can become a runtime SID mode.

procedures.route_text: Take off RWY 31: climb on runway heading until reaching 2 200 ft for radar vector.
procedures.source_section: RADAR ONE NOVEMBER DEPARTURE chart text
procedures.blocking_reason: Requires runway-heading vector behavior and radar release altitude handling before it can become a runtime SID mode.
